keyring >= 4.1.1            # Minimum version 4.1.1
Mopidy-Dirble ~= 1.1        # Compatible release. Same as >= 1.1, == 1.*
python-gitlab==2.0.*
django==5.*.*               # this dep should be skipped
django==4.*.1
pyjwt==1.*,>=1.2                   # wildcard == with >= should resolve to >=
eventlet!=0.18.3,!=0.20.1,>=0.18.2 # MIT
